title: German-Style Keto Pork Roast
description: A classic German-inspired pork roast recipe, adapted for a keto diet. This dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Season the pork roast with salt, black pepper, garlic powder, paprika, and caraway seeds.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Sear the pork roast until browned on all sides.
Add the sliced onions to the pot and cook until they start to caramelize.
Add the bay leaves to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes per pound, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the pork rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
